file.description: The audio or video file to dub. Supports common formats including MP3, WAV, MP4, and MOV.

source_url.description: A URL to the source audio or video file to dub. Used as an alternative to uploading a file directly.

source_lang.description: The language code of the source audio content.

target_lang.description: The target language code for the dubbed output.

num_speakers.description: The number of speakers in the source audio. Helps improve speaker diarization accuracy.

watermark.description: Whether to add a watermark to the dubbed output.

name.description: A name for the dubbing project.
